overview: The B.Sc. Program in Computing and Information System (CIS) is designed to produce skilled graduates who can satisfy the growing demand of computer and its applications at home and abroad. It provides the students an opportunity to obtain a broad knowledge in Computer hardware, software and applications with some freedom to tailor the program according to the student's individual needs.
waiver_info: Result-based waiver (bachelor's), Waiver on SGP (semester result), Female quota, Need-based, Play quota, Physically challenged/specially-abled, tribal/ethnic group quota, Sibling/spouse and son/daughter of current students quota, Waiver for DIU alumni, Group admission quota, Freedom fighter quota, And many more.
eligibility: Students having minimum 2.5 GPA or second division both in SSC and HSC from science group may apply for admission in CIS as per the guideline of University Grant Commission, Bangladesh. Students from English medium have to complete 5 subjects in O level, 2 subjects in A level. Out of these 7 subjects, 4 have to be minimum B and have no 'C'.
labs: Information System Architecture Planning and Modeling Lab
